title: Zesty Norwegian Fritters
description: A flavorful and crispy fritter dish inspired by Norwegian cuisine, perfect for a snack or appetizer. The combination of zesty and grassy notes will delight your taste buds.
instructions: Heat a non-stick pan with 2-3 inches of oil over medium heat.
Once the oil is hot, add 4-5 fritters to the pan and fry until golden brown on both sides.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters with a dollop of grassy yogurt sauce and a side of zesty chutney.
For an added crunch, sprinkle some fry breadcrumbs on top of the fritters before serving.
